description_long: This is a large, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a modern main battle tank. Its exterior is dominated by a long, prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret, with additional equipment such as a machine gun and cylindrical storage canisters attached to the hull and turret. The vehicle features thick, angular armor plating covering the entire body, with sloped surfaces for deflection and reinforced sections on the front and sides. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the suspension system is visible along the lower hull. The vehicle is painted in a solid olive drab color, with minimal visible markings except for a white number on the turret. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in urban and battlefield environments.
description: A large, olive drab armored tank with a long main cannon, rotating turret, and robust tracks. Features thick, sloped armor and minimal markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon extending forward, thick frontal armor, and the wide tracks.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the cannon, the machine gun on the turret, and cylindrical storage canisters on the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, exhaust vents, and the cylindrical canisters mounted on the rear deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the turret's side profile, track details, and the white number marking on the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret, one machine gun mount on top of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; reinforced frontal and turret sections; visible modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab color, no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White number '114' on the side of the turret.
